headings: SIXTEENTH: Compliance with Law and Safety
text: EIGHTEENTH: Written notice shall be duly served if delivered in person to an authorized representative of the person or entity for whom it was intended, or if delivered at or sent by registered or certified mail or by telefax to the address of such person or entity set forth in the Agreement. Any party to the Agreement shall have the right to change its address for receipt of written notice under this Agreement by duly serving written notice on the other party stating its new address. Notice shall be effective only if and when received by such authorized representative or at such address, except for notice sent by registered or certified mail deposited in the United States mail in a depository within the State of Texas which shall be effective at the end of the third business day after the date postmarked on the envelope containing such notice, if not sooner received by such authorized representative or at such address.
